backend/main.mo: Actor implements paste creation, storage, expiration logic, user profiles, and authorization, including legacy ID resolution and file chunk handling.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping features to affected frontend files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file listing summarized descriptions of various frontend source files.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base and design tokens defining light and dark theme CSS variables and global styles.
frontend/index.html: Base HTML document that loads the React application via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component handling hash-based routing and rendering create or view pages.
frontend/src/components/AppLayout.tsx: Layout component providing header, footer, and authenticated navigation elements.
frontend/src/components/ErrorState.tsx: Generic error/empty state UI for expired, not‑found, and network errors with retry support.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Login/logout button integrating Internet Identity authentication with loading states.
frontend/src/components/UploadProgressSt: Component displaying file upload progress with preparing, uploading, and creating stages.
frontend/src/config/pasteLimits.ts: Exports constants defining the 50MB per‑file upload size limit.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to the current Internet Identity, refreshing dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context for managing Internet Identity login, stored identity loading, and auth-client configuration.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for creating pastes with upload progress and fetching paste data by ID.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS base and theme variables for light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Initializes the React app with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider and mounts it to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/CreatePastePage.tsx: UI for creating text or file pastes with validation, upload progress, and share‑link generation.
frontend/src/pages/PasteViewPage.tsx: Displays a paste’s text and files, handles errors, and supports file downloads and expiration display.
frontend/src/utils/fileDownload.ts: Provides helpers to infer file extensions from MIME types, build safe download filenames, and download ExternalBlob data via a temporary link.
frontend/src/utils/formatRemainingTime.t: Converts nanosecond durations into concise human‑readable strings with minute, hour, and day granularity.
frontend/src/utils/pasteIds.ts: Validates, normalizes, and extracts paste IDs from route segments, supporting both numeric and GUID formats.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility for reading URL parameters, persisting them in sessionStorage, and manipulating hash‑based query params.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures TailwindCSS theme extensions, colors, fonts, animations, and includes typography, container query, and animation plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing current state, issues, and feature requests related to expiration wording and paste upload UX improvements.
